title: MemoryRecord
description: A sovereign memory record. Defines ownership, consent, and access controls for a discrete unit of AI-accessible memory.

id.description: A unique identifier for this memory record.

owner.description: The sovereign identifier of the entity that owns this memory. The owner has primacy over retention, access, and deletion.

custodian.description: The identifier of the system or entity currently holding this memory in trust for the owner. May differ from owner.

content.description: The memory content. May be a plain text summary, a structured JSON string, or a reference URI to content stored elsewhere.

contentType.description: The media type or category of the memory content.

consentBasis.description: The basis on which this memory was created and may be retained.

type.description: The legal or policy basis for holding this memory.

consentTimestamp.description: When the owner consented to this memory being created (if type is explicit-consent).

consentReference.description: Reference to the consent record or policy under which this memory is held.

accessPolicy.description: Who may access this memory and under what conditions.

authorizedReaders.description: List of entity identifiers authorized to read this memory.

authorizedAgents.description: List of agent identifiers that may use this memory in their operations.

readConditions.description: Human-readable description of conditions under which read access is permitted.

retentionPolicy.description: How long this memory may be retained.

expiresAt.description: Date and time after which this memory must be deleted.

retentionBasis.description: Why this memory is retained for the specified period.

autoDelete.description: Whether the custodian should automatically delete this memory at expiry.

exportable.description: Whether the owner may export this memory record.

exportFormats.description: Formats in which this memory may be exported.

created.description: When this memory record was created.

updated.description: When this memory record was last updated.

tags.description: Optional tags for categorizing or searching memory records.
